description: Replace worn plasma conduit in the primary carbon filter loop. Output efficiency has dropped below 75%.
Recalibrate gravity plating - Deck 3. Crew reports intermittent 0.2g fluctuations in the mess hall corridor.
Patch hull microfracture - Section J7. Micro-leak detected near reactor coolant junction; emergency sealant applied pending permanent repair.
Swap out degraded osmosis membranes in bank 2. Mineral buildup is reducing throughput by 30%.
Realign phase coils on the subspace relay. Signal drift causing intermittent packet loss on deep-space channels.
Preventive replacement of fuel injector seals. Current seals at 60% rated life — replacing ahead of next burn window.
